NOTE 5.       McCauley propellers with 3AF32C87 and 3AF32C504 hubs may be interchanged in any combination. This
also applies to propellers with 3AF32C93 and 3AF32C505m hubs; 3AF34C92 and 3AF37C516 hubs; 3AF34C74
and 3AF37C510 hubs.

NOTE 6.       Model 425 aircraft in compliance with Cessna Drawing 5700018 are eligible for certification in The Netherlands.

NOTE 7.       Model 425 S/N 425-0001 through 425-0176 (Corsair) are eligible for the maximum weights and C.G. range
applicable to S/N 425-0177 and up (Conquest I), when modified in accordance with Cessna Service Kit
SK425-17, and will be renamed Conquest I.

NOTE 8.       Production Certificate No. 4 effective at Serials 402C1005 and on, 414A1208 and on, 421C1801 and on, and
425-0228 and on.
